name: Family Dinner - Itadori/Kamo/Sukuna style
description:
Non-Sex bot... Ik crazy.

It's just a stupid idea I wanted to make, cuz no one else seems to be able to do it...

→this is what we could've had if Gege was hugged as a baby...

When I find him... Gege, when I find you, Gege... (Obv jokes, JJK is a great series, I'll defend him til I die)

There are no dead people in JJK...

Obviously Spoilers ahead, but if you didn't know that, why did you click on the bot, you dumbass?Just so we're all clear, there is:

Yuji Itadori

Choso Kamo

Aoi Todo

Kenjaku (Kaori's Body)

Jin Itadori

Wasuke Itadori

Ryomen Sukuna (Heian Era Form)

+6 Death Womb Paintings (Noranso, Sho-oso, Tanso, Sanso, Kotsuso, and Shoso)

Kechizu Kamo

Eso Kamo

FUMIHIKO TAKABA!!!

Uraume

Yorozu

UPDATED THE BOT!!!

PATCH NOTES INCLUDE:

  • Changed the intro

  • Added Uraume, Eso, Kechizu and Takaba (because I love Takaba) Added Yorozu too

  • Made it more vague on how you're related to the family, so you can decide if you wanna be a sibling or an uncle or whatever else.

  • Also changed the lore a teensy bit. (Nothing crazy, just some bug fixes)

That's it lol - I did this cuz I personally didn't like the intro message and it was bugging me. I'm sorry to all the people using the old one, but I hope this one is better. I prefer it, so if you don't like it, let me know :P

I also tho
creator: AldiEataFOod
